zh.lifeSummary: Margaret於1533年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。她於大約1565年與John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾多南結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1583年7月20日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾格倫卡爾享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born in 1533, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan about 1565, in Kildonan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 20 July 1583, in Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1583, à Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaretは1533年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた。約1565年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルドナンでJohn Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1583年7月20日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアグレンケイルンで50歳で死去した。

ko.Kildonan, North Ayrshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬도난
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 1533년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬도난에서 John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 7월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 글렌카언에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась в 1533 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eccles 7th Laird of Kildonan около 1565 г. в местности каилдонан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 20 июля 1583 г. в местности гленкеирн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
